name: Grillel Chicken Breasts W/Wild Mushroom,.... and Bourbon Sa
recipeIngredient: 20 Chicken breast halves, skinned and boned
2 1/2 oz Dried mixed wild mushrooms (e.g., porcini)
Soaked in hot water for 30 minutes, then drained and chopped
1/2 lb Sun-dried Tomatoes, soaked in hot water for 30 minutes, then drained and chopped
6 cups Rich beef stock or broth
recipeInstructions:
1. Make the marinade by whisking together 2 tablespoons chopped fresh rosemary, lemon juice, Dijon mustard, salt, and pepper in a bowl. Slowly add 1 1/2 cups olive oil while whisking. Marinate chicken breast halves for 1 to 8 hours.
2. Prepare the sauce in a large heavy-bottomed pan. Heat 1/4 cup olive oil over medium heat. Add shallots and garlic, sautéing until light golden brown. Stir in remaining olive oil, chopped rosemary, sliced shiitake mushrooms, dried wild mushrooms, and sun-dried tomatoes. Sprinkle flour over the mixture and stir well. Cook for 1-2 minutes, then gradually add the beef stock, stirring until a sauce forms. Add whipping cream, bourbon, salt, and pepper. Simmer on low heat for 8 minutes, or until thickened.
3. Remove chicken from marinade and grill or broil until cooked through but still moist (about 10 minutes). Reheat the sauce if needed.
4. Serve the grilled chicken topped with the prepared sauce.
